requirement.description: User can view all notes in a hierarchical list

results.evidence: In the provided screenshot, there is no hierarchical list of notes visible. The content on the screen appears to be a single block of text without any apparent structure or organization that would indicate a list of notes.
results.notes: The screenshot does not provide enough context or information to determine if other parts of the app meet the requirement. Therefore, it is unclear if the entire app meets this requirement.

requirement.description: Notes are displayed with their titles visible

results.evidence: In the screenshot, the title of a note is not visible.
results.notes: The image does not provide enough context to determine if any other notes have their titles visible. The title of the note that is partially displayed is not clear.

requirement.description: User can see a sidebar or navigation to browse notes

results.evidence: The screenshot shows a view of notes without any sidebar or navigation visible for browsing.
results.notes: There is no clear indication of a sidebar or navigation in the image to allow users to browse notes. This requirement may not be met as expected.

requirement.description: User can access a search function

results.evidence: No search function is visible on this screen.
results.notes: It is not possible to determine if there are more screens in the app that have a search function based solely on this single screenshot.

requirement.description: Search input field is visible or accessible

results.evidence: The screenshot shows a search input field which is clearly visible and accessible.
results.notes: No additional observations or suggestions are evident from the current image.

requirement.description: User can access an AI chat or assistant feature

results.evidence: The image provided does not show any UI elements related to an AI chat or assistant feature. It appears to be a screenshot of a webpage or application that does not have an obvious interface for interacting with an AI-based chatbot or similar feature.
results.notes: To determine if the requirement is met, additional screenshots showing different parts of the app, or interaction with the chat feature would be needed.

requirement.description: Chat interface has an input field for questions

results.evidence: There is no visible input field for questions in the image.
results.notes: The chat interface seems to be a graphical representation and does not provide any interaction options. The elements present are a text box containing a message and a close button at the top right corner.

requirement.description: User can see a button or option to create a new note

results.evidence: No button or option for creating a note is visible on this screen.
results.notes: This appears to be a screenshot of an application displaying some form of content list or navigation menu. However, the requirement focuses specifically on the creation of a new note. In order to properly assess whether this requirement is met, it would be necessary to view additional screens within the app that showcase the creation feature in question.

requirement.description: New note creation is accessible from the main screen

results.evidence: The image provided does not show a 'main screen' or any visible way to create a new note from it.
results.notes: It is not clear if there are other screens within the app that meet this requirement. Further investigation would be required to ensure compliance with the stated requirement.

requirement.description: Notes appear to support nesting or hierarchy

results.evidence: The screenshot shows a note-taking app with notes and subnotes in a hierarchical structure, clearly supporting nesting or hierarchy.
results.notes: The nested notes are indicated by indentation. The text within the note supports the hierarchy as well.

requirement.description: Indentation or folder structure is visible for nested notes

results.evidence: The image provided does not show any visible indentation or folder structure for nested notes within the app.
results.notes: From what is visible in the screenshot, it seems that there might be some level of hierarchy suggested by the content on the screen, but it is unclear whether this represents actual nesting or simply a presentation style. To determine if the requirement is met, more information about how the app handles nested notes would be needed.

requirement.description: Editor area is visible when viewing/editing a note

results.evidence: No editor area is visible in this screenshot. There are no input fields or any indication of a block editor.
results.notes: In order to determine if the requirement 'Editor area is visible when viewing/editing a note' is met, additional states and actions would need to be observed. For example, navigating through different screens, tapping on an item, or clicking an edit button.

requirement.description: Formatting toolbar or options are available

results.evidence: There is no formatting toolbar or options visible in the screenshot.
results.notes: The image appears to be of a mobile device screen showing a screenshot of a mobile app. The content visible includes a message that says, 'PLEASE REVIEW THE STATEMENT BELOW BEFORE PUBLISHING.' However, it is not clear if this is the main view of an iOS app or if it is a specific feature related to the Block Editor in question. There are no UI elements immediately evident that relate to formatting toolbars or options.

requirement.description: User can see block-level content (paragraphs, headings, lists)

results.evidence: Text blocks are not visible in this screenshot.
results.notes: The screenshot shows a screenshot of an app, but it does not show any block-level content such as paragraphs, headings, or lists. This is because the image appears to have been taken from an incorrect screen or state where no block editor content is displayed. To assess if the requirement is met, a different screenshot should be provided with the block editor visible.

requirement.description: App has mobile-appropriate navigation (bottom tabs or hamburger menu)

results.evidence: In the provided screenshot, there are bottom tabs that serve as mobile-appropriate navigation.

requirement.description: Touch targets appear appropriately sized for mobile

results.evidence: The touch targets in the image are too small for mobile. The buttons and text fields seem to be designed for desktop use rather than mobile.
results.notes: To meet the requirement, the touch targets should be of appropriate size based on the platform guidelines. In this case, the sizes appear to be unsuitable for a mobile device.

requirement.description: Content is readable without horizontal scrolling

results.evidence: Content is readable without horizontal scrolling, but it's unclear whether there are any elements that require horizontal scrolling because they might not be visible in this screenshot.
results.notes: There are no visible horizontal scroll bars, and the content appears to fit within the viewport. However, without additional context or the ability to interact with the app, it's difficult to determine if there is any content that requires horizontal scrolling.
